title: dimorphanthes obtusa
intro: Dimorphanthes obtusa, also known as the obtuse dimorphanthes, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of dimorphanthes obtusa include its potential to alleviate symptoms of various diseases, such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. Dimorphanthes obtusa is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and its extracts are also used in various herbal preparations, such as capsules and tinctures.
